text:
I think I know someone who'd like this.

Once upon an autumn afternoon, under a sky dusted with stars.

There was a girl called Willow. She had hair like golden hairflowers.

She loved animals. Especially owls.

One night, a barred owl took unexpected flight into her window. Eyes gleaming moonlight.

Willow touched it gently. Owls have soft voices.

Owl spoke.

"You like night time?"

"Africa."

"Stars."

"Like you."

Silent flight out the window.

That night, Willow dreamed of the night owl.

Stars glittered like gemstones.

A big owl hooted.

Together they flew.

And that night, Willow woke feeling better.

Just a dream.

Maybe she dreamed about you.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
